The AI operating system
built for how founders actually work.

Five coordinated AI operators handling research, brand, website, outreach, and analytics — all sharing context, all working toward your revenue goal.

Start Free → Back to home
No credit card required 5 operators included free Setup in under 60 seconds

What's inside

Everything a founding team needs.

One system. No stitching together five tools. No context loss between functions.

🔬

Research Operator — Validate before you build

Before you spend a week building, CEOClaw's Research operator validates demand, maps the competitive landscape, defines your ICP, and surfaces the fastest path to revenue. Informed execution starts here.

✦

Brand Operator

Naming, positioning, messaging hierarchy, and design tokens — generated from your ICP and differentiation strategy, not a generic template.

⬡

Website Operator

Multi-page, conversion-focused sites from a single prompt. Semantic HTML, accessible structure, responsive layout. Ships, not previews.

◈

Outreach Operator

ICP-targeted cold sequences and warm intro drafts, brand-matched and cadenced for follow-up — not generic blast copy.

◉

Analytics Operator — Closing the loop

Tracks MRR against target, scores each cycle, detects stagnation early, and recommends next-best domain — so the system self-corrects without you having to step in and diagnose.

Benefits

Why it works when other tools don't.

  • Shared context, not isolated threads

    Every operator reads and writes to the same session state. Brand research informs website copy. Outreach reflects product positioning. Actions compound.

  • Goal-aware, not prompt-reactive

    CEOClaw knows your MRR target. It routes each cycle to the domain with the highest leverage — not the last thing you typed.

  • Evaluation built in, not bolted on

    After every cycle, an evaluator scores output against your goal. Progress is measured. Stagnation is caught. The loop continues or stops based on real results.

  • One system, not five subscriptions

    Replace the fragmented stack of research tools, no-code builders, email tools, and analytics dashboards with a single, coherent execution layer.

// execution pipeline
01
Set your goal

Define target MRR and number of cycles.

02
Planner activates

Assesses current state and prioritizes next domain.

03
Operator executes

Research, Brand, Website, Outreach, or Analytics — whichever has highest leverage.

04
Evaluator scores

Output is measured. MRR delta is tracked. Stagnation checked.

05
Loop or complete

Goal reached → export summary. Gap remains → next cycle begins.

Operator reference

All five operators at a glance.

Operator Primary output Inputs used Status
🔬 Research ICP definition, competitor map, demand signals Goal, industry, target market Active
✦ Brand Naming, positioning, design tokens Research output, ICP Active
⬡ Website Multi-page HTML site Brand output, product intent Active
◈ Outreach Cold sequences, follow-up cadences ICP, brand voice, product value prop Active
◉ Analytics MRR delta, trend, next-action recommendation All operator outputs, current MRR Active

Your execution layer is ready.

Start free. Five operators. One goal. Your idea goes in — traction comes out.
